title: The Indian Tolls (Army and Air Force) Act, 1901
full_text: The Indian Tolls (Army and Air Force) Act, 1901 भारतीय पथ-कर (सेना और वायु सेना) अधिनियम, 1901 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 190102 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 1901-02-22 Act Year: 1901 Short Title: The Indian Tolls (Army and Air Force) Act, 1901 Hindi Title: भारतीय पथ-कर (सेना और वायु सेना) अधिनियम, 1901 Long Title: An Act to amend the law relating to the exemption from tolls of persons and property belonging to the Army or Air Force. Ministry: Ministry of Defence Department: Department of Military Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-04-1901 Last Updated: 24-12-2018 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indian Tolls (Army and Air Force) Act, 1901 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Exemptions from tolls. Section 4. Tolls on vessels transporting troops and baggage, etc., of troops embarked or disembarked. Section 5. Penalty. Section 6. Compensation. Section 7. Rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. [Repealed.]. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
